nodes.name: Estrilda
nodes.summary: Estrilda（Estrilda）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联11种鸟类，如Kandt's waxbill、黑头梅花雀、橙颊梅花雀等11种鸟类。

nodes.name: Kandt's waxbill
nodes.summary: Kandt's waxbill（Estrilda kandti）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Kandt's waxbill。

nodes.name: Kandt's waxbill
nodes.summary: Kandt's waxbill (Estrilda kandti) is a species of estrildid finch found in central Africa. It is sometimes considered conspecific with the black-headed waxbill. References Clements, J. F., T. S. Schulenberg, M. J. Iliff, B.L. Sullivan, C. L. Wood, and D. Roberson. 2012. The eBird/Clements checklist of birds of the world: Version 6.7. Downloaded from [1]
